snippet.description:
The Mixed Martial Arts Hour is back in your life! Below is a rundown of Wednesday’s show, which begins at 1 p.m. ET / 10 a.m. PT / 6 p.m. UK time.

00:00:00 Standby. 

00:01:17 Intro.

00:13:26 We kick off the show as I answer all your questions on the latest edition of On the Nose (Part 1).

01:47:54 Brandon Royval looks back at his big win over Matheus Nicolau at UFC Kansas City and discusses what’s next for his rise up the flyweight division.

02:04:41 Mayweather Promotions CEO Leonard Ellerbe previews Saturday’s blockbuster boxing showdown between Tank Davis and Ryan Garica.

02:21:59 ONE Championship kingpin Demetrious Johnson joins us in-studio to look ahead to his May 5 trilogy fight against Adriano Moraes and more.

snippet.title: Essex Property Trust Maintaining Capital Allocation Discipline
snippet.description:
Angela Kleiman, president and CEO of Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESS), participated in a video interview at Nareit’s REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference, held in New York June 6-8.

Kleiman discussed her priorities for the company in her new role as CEO, fundamentals in Essex’s core West Coast markets, including the supply outlook and whether Essex is seeing an impact on leasing levels from layoffs in the tech sector, how active Essex is likely to be on the acquisition, disposition, and development front for the remainder of 2023, and the outlook for the multifamily sector more broadly.

Read more: https://www.reit.com/news/video/essex-property-trust-maintaining-capital-allocation-discipline

snippet.title: U.S. Transhumanist Party Virtual Enlightenment Salon with Daniel Faggella – February 5, 2023
snippet.description:
On Sunday, February 5, 2023, the U.S. Transhumanist Party invited Daniel Faggella to address the near-future of generative AI technologies, as well as how the wise application of artificial intelligence can help guide our transition into the Transhuman Era and avoid some of the pitfalls along the way. How can humans, in using emerging technologies that allow for increasing customization of experience, maintain alignment between human desires and objectively beneficial outcomes? How can the best paths for future technological development be pursued notwithstanding less-than-ideal human motives and proclivities? 

Founder and Head of Research at Emerj Artificial Intelligence Research – https://emerj.com/, Daniel Faggella is an internationally recognized speaker on the use-cases and return on investment of artificial intelligence in business.

Daniel is regularly called upon by global enterprises in financial services and security, and has spoken for organizations including the World Bank, the United Nations, the OECD, INTERPOL, and more.

Visit Daniel Faggella’s website at https://danfaggella.com/. 

Essays by Daniel Faggella - https://danfaggella.com/essays/ 

- “The Transhuman Transition: Lotus Eaters vs. World Eaters” – May 28, 2018  –  https://danfaggella.com/the-transhuman-transition-lotus-eaters-vs-world-eaters/ 

- “You Don’t Want What You Think You Want – AI and Procedurally Generated Worlds” – August 11, 2022 – https://emerj.com/ai-power/you-dont-want-what-you-think-you-want/ 

Timestamps

3:30 - Daniel Faggella's introduction

13:15 - Allen Crowley asking Daniel Faggella for clarification on lotus eaters vs. world eaters, to Gennady Stolyarov II saying that he reflected a decade or so ago that meaning was becoming more multifaceted, to the physical world still being more important than the virtual world, world eaters sacrificing values for power, to Daniel's answer

23:58 - Gennady Stolyarov II asking Daniel Faggella what percentage of people he thinks will be lotus eaters

28:14 - David Wood asking Daniel Faggella who will design platforms, and how to ensure these platforms keep people sufficiently in tune with the real world to keep people accountable for what happens in the physical world

37:54 - Gennady Stolyarov II asking Daniel Faggella how due process before blocking from online platforms could be ensured in the VR landscape as it becomes where we exist more and more

42:30 - Dan Elton asking Daniel Faggella for timelines on virtual reality being more consuming

54:29 - Gennady Stolyarov II asking Daniel Faggella if an AI partner could help with their interactions with other real beings, then sharing David Wood's comments about us already being pretty immersed

56:18 - Ben Ballweg saying his connection to reality is essential to want to keep living, and asking for Daniel Faggella's pushback

1:04:42 - Alexandria Black asking Daniel Faggella what reward circuits would look like in AI

1:07:56 - Celeste Castaldo asking Daniel Faggella how biofeedback could best help AI help us

1:12:20 - Alexandria Black asking Daniel Faggella how AI will be able to help us with our social lives

1:21:45 - Art Ramon Garcia, Jr., asking Daniel Faggella how AI that allows us to immerse could also help us break from the dopamine reward circuit

1:27:18 - Jason Geringer asking Daniel Faggella why we would have to pay for a helpful AI

1:29:54 - Daniel Faggella and David Wood conversing on how useful AI might be provided

1:38:32 - David Wood saying it seems UK Parliament is getting very interested quite recently in AI, but in an open-minded way

1:40:27 - Gennady Stolyarov II saying broader social circles could help with teenager depression

1:43:56 - Gennady Stolyarov II asking Daniel Faggella and David Wood how we can ensure beneficent AI will be available to all

1:52:29 - Daniel Faggella's closing remarks, including how we could realize the best paths to AI development 

Join the U.S. Transhumanist Party for free, no matter where you reside: https://transhumanist-party.org/membership/ 

#USTranshumanistParty #VirtualEnlightenmentSalon #ArtificialIntelligence #AIEthics #ProceduralGeneration #Transhumanism #Transhuman #EmergingTechnologies #USTP

snippet.title: Shane Beamer Adds Another Offensive Playmaker In Eddie Lewis! | South Carolina Football
snippet.description:
On today's show, Andrew dives into the South Carolina Football team's latest addition in Memphis transfer Eddie Lewis, and discusses why his addition checks off more boxes in terms of needs at the wide receiver position. He then dives into some other positions Shane Beamer and the coaching staff should look to add more players via the transfer portal, primarily the defensive end and running back position.

Lastly, Andrew previews the announcement of 2024 Gamecock target Michael Smith taking place later this afternoon, talks about where he feels this announcement will go and what trend the potential addition of Smith could kickstart for the South Carolina Gamecocks!

What are your thoughts on Eddie Lewis? Do you believe South Carolina will land Michael Smith?

snippet.title: NWA Crockett Cup 2023: Night 2 REVIEW | WZWA Network (June 4th, 2023)
snippet.description:
Host Karlifornia breaks down and reviews Night 2 of the NWA Crockett Cup - on June 4th, 2023, from the Winston-Salem Fairgrounds, Winston-Salem, North Carolina. Covering a 60 minute Pre-Show and 2 hour, 45 minute Main Card, Karlifornia has a lot to cover and a lot to say... again!

Intro - 0:00
NWA US Tag Team Titles: The Country Gentlemen (c) Vs Magnum Muscle Vs The Now Vs The Fixers Vs Talos/Daisy Kill Vs T.N.T vs The Spectaculars Vs S.V.G.S Vs Toxin/Arez - 0:42
Thrillbilly Vs Dan Maff - 4:36
NWA World Womens Tag Titles: M95 (c) Vs Max The Impaler/Angelina Love - 6:17
NWA Women's Television Championship: Kenzie Paige (c) Vs Ruthy Jay - 7:24
-
Quarter Finals #1: Myzteziz Jr./Octogon Jr. Vs Brothers of Funstruction - 8:56
Quarter Finals #2: The Mortons Vs Knox & Murdoch - 9:37
Quarter Finals #3: Tyrus/Chris Masters Vs Kratos/Odinson - 11:13
Quarter Finals #4: Blunt Force Trauma w/Aron Stevens Vs La Rebelion w/Vampiro - 12:38
NWA National Championship: EC3 (c) Vs Thom Latimer - 14:46
7 Man Scramble: Eric Jackson Vs Jarron Fulton Vs PJ Hawx Vs Gagz the Gimp Vs Flip Gordon Vs Joe Alonzo Vs Colby Corino - 16:42
Semi Final #1: Blunt Force Trauma w/Aron Stevens Vs Octogon Jr. and Mysztesez Jr. - 19:52
Semi Final #2: Tyrus/Chris Adonis Vs Knox & Murdoch - 22:39
No DQ: Cyon w/Austin Idol Vs Masked Man - 24:01
NWA World Women's Championship: Kamille (c) Vs Natalia Markova - 27:50
Crockett Cup 2023 Finals: Blunt Force Trauma Vs Knox & Murdoch - 34:29
Final Thoughts/Rating - 37:17
